nasb.text: but emptied Himself, taking the form of a bond-servant, and being made in the likeness of men.

esv.text: but emptied himself, by taking the form of a servant,  being born in the likeness of men.

cnv.text: 反而倒空自己，取了奴僕的形象，成為人的樣式；

ccb.text: 反而甘愿放下一切， 取了奴仆的形象， 降生为人的样子。

csbs.text: 反而倒空自己， 取了奴仆的形像，成为人的样式， 以人的形态出现，
